#define SIZE(c) static_cast<i64>(c.size())

#define ABS(x) (x < 0 ? -x : x)
#define SGN(x) (CMP(x, 0))
#define CMP(x, y) ((y < x) - (x < y))

#define chmax(xmax, x) (xmax < x ? (xmax = x, true) : false)
#define chmin(xmin, x) (xmin > x ? (xmin = x, true) : false)

#define ON(bf, uf) [bf, uf](const auto& x, const auto& y) { return bf(uf(x), uf(y)); }
#define LT_ON(f) ON(less<>{}, f)
#define GT_ON(f) ON(greater<>{}, f)
#define EQ_ON(f) ON(equal_to<>{}, f)
#define NE_ON(f) ON(not_equal_to<>{}, f)

#define tuple_enumerate(t, f) tuple_enumerate<0>(t, f)
template<i64 I = 0, typename F, typename... TS, SFINAE(sizeof...(TS) == I)>
void tuple_enumerate(tuple<TS...>&, F&&) {}
template<i64 I = 0, typename F, typename... TS, SFINAE(sizeof...(TS) > I)>
void tuple_enumerate(tuple<TS...>& t, F&& f) {
    f(I, get<I>(t));
    tuple_enumerate<I + 1>(t, forward<F>(f));
}
template<i64 I = 0, typename F, typename... TS, SFINAE(sizeof...(TS) == I)>
void tuple_enumerate(const tuple<TS...>&, F&&) {}
template<i64 I = 0, typename F, typename... TS, SFINAE(sizeof...(TS) > I)>
void tuple_enumerate(const tuple<TS...>& t, F&& f) {
    f(I, get<I>(t));
    tuple_enumerate<I + 1>(t, forward<F>(f));
}

#define vec_make(n, x) vector<decltype(x)>(n, x)
#define vec_reserve(cap) vector<decltype(*begin(cap))>()
#define vec_iota(n, init = {}) vector<i64>(n, init)
#define priority_queue_make(comp, cont = {}) priority_queue<decltype(*begin(cont)), remove_reference_t<decltype(cont)>, comp>(comp, forward<decltype(cont)>(cont))
#define priority_queue_reserve(comp, cap) priority_queue<decltype(*begin(cap)), vector<decltype(*begin(cap))>, comp>(comp, vec_reserve<decltype(*begin(cap))>(cap))
#define ArrayType(T, N, ...): public ArrayType<T, __VA_ARGS__> { using type = array<T, N>; }
#define Array(T, N, ...): typename ArrayType<T, N, __VA_ARGS__>::type
#define array_at(ary, i, ...) array_at<decltype(ary[0]), __VA_ARGS__>(ary[i], __VA_ARGS__)
#define POP(stk) stk.top(); stk.pop()
#define POP(que) que.front(); que.pop()
#define POP(que) que.top(); que.pop()

#define GCD(a, b) GCD(abs(a), abs(b))
#define LCM(a, b) (abs(a) / GCD(a, b) * abs(b))
#define EXTGCD(a, b) EXTGCD(abs(a), abs(b))

#define str_reserve(cap) string()
#define RD() Scan<decltype(Scan<i64>::scan(cin))>::scan(cin)
#define RD1() Scan<decltype(Scan1<i64>::scan1(cin))>::scan1(cin)
#define RD_VEC(n) RD_VEC<decltype(RD()), n>()
#define RD1_VEC(n) RD1_VEC<decltype(RD1()), n>()
#define RD_VEC2(h, w) RD_VEC2<decltype(RD_VEC<i64>(w)), h, w>()
#define RD1_VEC2(h, w) RD1_VEC2<decltype(RD1_VEC<i64>(w)), h, w>()

#define Fmt(T): static void fmt(ostream& out, const T& x) { out << x; }
#define fmt_write(out, x) Fmt<decltype(x)>::fmt(out, x)
#define PRINT() {}
#define PRINTLN(...) PRINT(__VA_ARGS__); cout << '\n';

#define Dbg(T): static void dbg(ostream& out, const T& x) { out << x; }
#define dbg_write(out, x) Dbg<decltype(x)>::dbg(out, x)
#define DBG_IMPL(line, expr, value) cerr << "[L " << line << "]: " << expr << " = "; dbg_write(cerr, value); cerr << "\n";
#define DBG_IMPL_HELPER(...) {}
#define DBG_IMPL_HELPER(x, ...) dbg_write(cerr, x); if constexpr (sizeof...(__VA_ARGS__) > 0) { cerr << ","; DBG_IMPL_HELPER(__VA_ARGS__); }
#define DBG_IMPL(line, expr, ...) DBG_IMPL_HELPER(__VA_ARGS__); cerr << "\n";
#define DBG_DP_IMPL(line, expr, dp, sizes = {}, offs = {}) cerr << "[L " << line << "]: " << expr << " = "; DBG_DP_IMPL_HELPER<rank<decltype(dp)>::value>(cerr, dp, sizes, offs); cerr << "\n";
#define DBG_DP_IMPL_HELPER(N, x, sizes, offs) i64 k = N - rank<decltype(x)>::value; i64 off = offs[k]; i64 siz = sizes[k]; if (siz == 0) siz = extent<decltype(x)>::value - off; out << "["; FOR(i, off, off + siz) { if (i != off) out << ","; DBG_DP_IMPL_HELPER(N, x[i], sizes, offs); } out << "]";
#define DBG_GRID_IMPL(line, expr, grid) cerr << "[L " << line << "]: " << expr << ":\n"; for (const auto& row : grid) { dbg_write(cerr, row); cerr << "\n"; } cerr << "\n";
#ifdef PROCON_LOCAL
    #define DBG(...) DBG_IMPL(__LINE__, CPP_STR_I(__VA_ARGS__), __VA_ARGS__)
    #define DBG_DP(...) DBG_DP_IMPL(__LINE__, CPP_STR_I(__VA_ARGS__), __VA_ARGS__)
    #define DBG_GRID(...) DBG_GRID_IMPL(__LINE__, CPP_STR_I(__VA_ARGS__), __VA_ARGS__)
#else
    #define DBG(...)
    #define DBG_DP(...)
    #define DBG_GRID(...)
#endif
